title: Avonni and Salesforce: Build Better, Faster, Together
author: Julie Thompson

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: At Salesforce, we help empower our customers to build amazing things. Our incredible community of admins and developers is a testament to this, constantly innovating and creating powerful solutions for their businesses. We’re inspired by your innovation, and we’re committed to making it easier and faster for you to bring your ideas to life on the Agentforce 360 Platform. That’s why we’re happy to announce a new partnership withAvonni, a leader in providing advanced,no-code solutionsfor Salesforce. Through this collaboration, our users now have a rich set of out-of-the-box components to build powerful internal and external applications on the Salesforce Platform.

sections.heading: A new level of no-code development
sections.text: Avonni shares our belief that you shouldn’t have to write code to create stunning, dynamic user interfaces. To kick off this partnership,Avonni has released a brand new AppExchange packagethat puts an incredible suite of tools directly into your hands. The package includes a rich set of custom components designed for bothLightning App BuilderandExperience Builder. From responsive layouts to data-rich displays, these components give you a powerful new palette for design. But the real game-changer is theDynamic Component Builder, a no-code tool that allows you to create custom, reusable components with complex logic and conditional visibility‌ — ‌all without touching a single line of Apex or JavaScript. Imagine dragging and dropping your way to a custom dashboard for your sales team, a dynamic service portal for customers, or an intuitive mobile app for your field agents. With Avonni’s tools, you’re not just building components — ‌you’re crafting the experiences your business needs to succeed.

inline_links.text: Avonni has released a brand new AppExchange package

sections.heading: More access, more innovation
sections.text: To bring these powerful tools to as many Trailblazers as possible, Avonni is expanding its freemium license offering. You can now get free licenses forup to 10 internal users and 100 external users. Customers who require additional licenses can purchase them directly from Avonni. This generous offering allows you to pilot projects, create prototypes, and even launch fully functional applications for a significant number of your users at no cost. It’s a great opportunity to experiment, iterate, and prove the value of a no-code approach within your organization.

sections.heading: Build for the future, today
sections.text: Our partnership with Avonni is a clear signal of our commitment to empowering theSalesforce Admincommunity. We believe the future of building on our platform is one where every admin and business user has the tools to innovate and solve problems quickly and efficiently. With Avonni’s no-code components, you can accelerate your development cycles, respond to business needs faster, and deliver more engaging applications that drive adoption and productivity. Whether you’re a seasoned admin looking for new tools or a beginner just starting your journey, this partnership provides everything you need to build better, faster, and together. Check out the new package and get started today on the Salesforce AppExchange.

inline_links.text: Check out the new package and get started today on the Salesforce AppExchange.

existing_ctas.heading: What is no-code? A comprehensive guide
existing_ctas.body: No-code platforms allow anyone, regardless of technical skill, to design and build functional apps.

raw_html:
At Salesforce, we help empower our customers to build amazing things. Our incredible community of admins and developers is a testament to this, constantly innovating and creating powerful solutions for their businesses. We’re inspired by your innovation, and we’re committed to making it easier and faster for you to bring your ideas to life on the Agentforce 360 Platform.

That’s why we’re happy to announce a new partnership with Avonni, a leader in providing advanced, no-code solutions for Salesforce. Through this collaboration, our users now have a rich set of out-of-the-box components to build powerful internal and external applications on the Salesforce Platform.

What is no-code? A comprehensive guide

No-code platforms allow anyone, regardless of technical skill, to design and build functional apps.

Learn more

A new level of no-code development

Avonni shares our belief that  you shouldn’t have to write code to create stunning, dynamic user interfaces. To kick off this partnership, Avonni has released a brand new AppExchange package that puts an incredible suite of tools directly into your hands.

The package includes a rich set of custom components designed for both Lightning App Builder and Experience Builder. From responsive layouts to data-rich displays, these components give you a powerful new palette for design. But the real game-changer is the Dynamic Component Builder, a no-code tool that allows you to create custom, reusable components with complex logic and conditional visibility‌ — ‌all without touching a single line of Apex or JavaScript.

Imagine dragging and dropping your way to a custom dashboard for your sales team, a dynamic service portal for customers, or an intuitive mobile app for your field agents. With Avonni’s tools, you’re not just building components — ‌you’re crafting the experiences your business needs to succeed.

More access, more innovation 

To bring these powerful tools to as many Trailblazers as possible, Avonni is expanding its freemium license offering. You can now get free licenses for up to 10 internal users and 100 external users. Customers who require additional licenses can purchase them directly from Avonni.

This generous offering allows you to pilot projects, create prototypes, and even launch fully functional applications for a significant number of your users at no cost. It’s a great opportunity to experiment, iterate, and prove the value of a no-code approach within your organization.

Build for the future, today

Our partnership with Avonni is a clear signal of our commitment to empowering the Salesforce Admin community. We believe the future of building on our platform is one where every admin and business user has the tools to innovate and solve problems quickly and efficiently.

With Avonni’s no-code components, you can accelerate your development cycles, respond to business needs faster, and deliver more engaging applications that drive adoption and productivity. Whether you’re a seasoned admin looking for new tools or a beginner just starting your journey, this partnership provides everything you need to build better, faster, and together.

Check out the new package and get started today on the Salesforce AppExchange.

Build apps using no-code tools in Salesforce

Explore no-code tools to help you build apps on Salesforce.
